productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Limnos Black Casual Shoes
description: Understated style and a great shape mean this canvas shoe from puma will go with any outfit. Subtle details are provided by the quirky lacing and funky stitching on the sides. Wear it on days when you want to tell the world you don't have to try too hard to be cool. Upper Canvas upper for style and comfort Branding on front seam, brand name tag on tongue and branding printed on the heel guard Midsole Breathable fabric lining and a cushioned footbed for all-day comfort. TPU and EVA midsole combined to give you support and ample cushioning Outsole Textured durable rubber outsole for maximum traction and grip shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
